Trigger.name: EKs lesen
Trigger.script: --display(matches[2]) local found_eks = tonumber(matches[2]) --display(EK.current, found_eks, EK.saved, delta) EK.current = found_eks local delta = found_eks-EK.saved if delta < 0 then GUI.ekanzahl:echo("EK-Anzahl: "..found_eks-delta.."("..delta..")", "black") elseif delta == 0 then GUI.ekanzahl:echo("EK-Anzahl: "..found_eks, "black") else GUI.ekanzahl:echo("EK-Anzahl: "..found_eks-delta.."(+"..delta..")", "black") end

regexCodeList.string: | fuer deren Hinscheiden er mit Stufenpunkten |

Trigger.name: Auslesen Teil 1
Trigger.script:
display("Du hast:") display(matches[2])
if matches[2]=="ein" then EK.plaketten_flag1 = 1 else EK.plaketten_flag1 = tonumber(matches[2]) end
EK:save_plakettenabgleich(matches[4])

regexCodeList.string: ^Du hast (\w+) Monster getoetet, (das|die) (\w+) noch nicht getoetet hat.$

Trigger.name: Auslesen, Teil 2
Trigger.script:
display(matches[2].." hat:") display(matches[3])
if matches[3]=="ein" then EK.plaketten_flag2 = 1 else EK.plaketten_flag2 = tonumber(matches[3]) end
EK:save_plakettenabgleich(matches[2])

regexCodeList.string: ^(\w+) hat (\w+) Monster getoetet, (das|die) Du noch nicht getoetet hast.$

Alias.name: hacke EK ab
Alias.script: if #matches==2 then EK:check(tonumber(matches[2])) else EK:check(tonumber(matches[2]), matches[4]) end

Alias.name: finde EK
Alias.script: if matches[3]=="" then EK:find("name", matches[4], true) else EK:find(matches[3], matches[4], true) end

Alias.name: nur EK-Namen hinzufügen (wenn es schnell gehen muss)
Hilfe
Alias.script:
decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKcheck <ID> <Datum>?
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKuncheck <ID>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EK <ID>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKunknown -?<Anzahl>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EK <ID> change <Attribut>:<Inhalt>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKfind <Attribut>:?<Suchtext> (Fuer Auflistung der EKs)
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKlist <Attribut>:?<Suchtext> (Fuer Auflistung der Attribute)
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKam <Datum DD.MM.YY>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKab <Datum DD.MM.YY>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKbis <Datum DD.MM.YY>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKzwischen <Datum DD.MM.YY> und <Datum DD.MM.YY>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKdiff <Zweitiename>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#plakette <Konkurrentenname>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKadd <Name>|<Ort>|<Region>|<Magier>|<Hinweis>|<Para>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKdel <ID>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKmove <alte ID> <neue ID>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKsadd <Name>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EK <ID1> <ID2> ... <IDn> multichange <Attribut>:<Inhalt>
") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>#EKmiss

")

Alias.name: EK filtern und bearbeiten
Alias.script:
display(matches)
if matches[3]=="" then EK:multichange(EK:find("name", matches[4], false), matches[5], matches[6]) else EK:multichange(EK:find(matches[3], matches[4], false), matches[5], matches[6]) end

Script.name: Core
Script.script:
------------------------------------------------- -- Put your Lua functions here. -- -- -- -- Note that you can also use external scripts -- -------------------------------------------------
EK = EK or { first=true, current=0, saved=0, player={}, own_id=-1, npc={}, player_number=-1, del_flag = -1, change_flag = -1, plaketten_flag1 = -1, plaketten_flag2 = -1, pdel_flag = -1, friends={}, mchange_flag="", attr = {"Name", "Ort", "Region", "Magier", "Hinweis", "Para"} }

Script.name: load/save
Script.script:
------------------------------------------------- -- Put your Lua functions here. -- -- -- -- Note that you can also use external scripts -- ------------------------------------------------- function EK:get_attr(attr) if attr=="name" then return 1 elseif attr=="ort" then return 2 elseif attr=="region" then return 3 elseif attr=="magier" then return 4 elseif attr=="hinweis" then return 5 elseif attr=="para" then return 6 end end
function EK:load(demo) if not (ME.name == "ABCDEFGHKLM") then self:load_EKs() self:load_friends() end end
function EK:load_friends() local lines local temp local fname lines = pload_csv("Plaketten_Liste") self.friends = {} if lines then for j, sline in ipairs(lines) do temp = {} fname = sline[1] for i=2,#sline do table.insert(temp, sline[i]) end if self.friends[fname] then table.insert(self.friends[fname], temp) else self.friends[fname] = {temp} end end end end
function EK:load_EKs() local setting local lines setting, lines = mload_csv("EK_Liste", true) self.players = {} for i=1,#setting/2,1 do if #setting[2*i-1]>0 then if setting[2*i-1] == ME.name then self.own_id = i end self.player[setting[2*i-1]] = tonumber(setting[2*i]) table.insert(self.players, setting[2*i-1]) end end local add_column = self.own_id == -1 if add_column then -- new player!!! self.player[ME.name] = 0 self.own_id = (#setting/2)+1 end self.saved = self.player[ME.name] self.npc={} local para_id = self:get_attr("para") for j,sline in ipairs(lines) do if #sline[para_id]>0 and tonumber(sline[para_id]) then sline[para_id] = tonumber(sline[para_id]) end if add_column then table.insert(sline, "") end if (not add_column) and #sline[#self.attr+self.own_id] > 0 then self.saved = self.saved+1 end table.insert(self.npc, sline) end GUI.ekanzahl:echo("EK-Anzahl: "..self.saved, "black") if gmcp.MG.char.base.wizlevel == 1 then send("lies plakette") else self.current = self.saved end end
function EK:save() self:save_EK() self:save_friends() end
function EK:save_EK() local setting={} for k,v in pairs(self.player) do table.insert(setting, k) table.insert(setting, v) end self:controll_saving() msave_csv("EK_Liste", EK.npc, setting) end
function EK:controll_saving() local norm = len(self.attr)+len(self.player) for i=1,len(self.npc) do for i=1,norm-len(self.npc[i]) do table.insert(self.npc[i], "") end end end
function EK:save_friends() local temp = {} for k,v in pairs(self.friends) do for j,vv in pairs(v) do table.insert(temp, {k, unpack(vv)}) end end psave_csv("Plaketten_Liste", temp) end

Script.name: EK-Listen handling
Script.script:
------------------------------------------------- -- Put your Lua functions here. -- -- -- -- Note that you can also use external scripts -- -------------------------------------------------
function EK:missing() local result={} local max_len = 0
local name_id = self:get_attr("name") local para_id = self:get_attr("para") local ort_id = self:get_attr("ort")
local oid = #self.attr+self.own_id
for k,v in ipairs(self.npc) do if len(v[oid])==0 then temp_index = "" temp_index = "<255,255,0:0,0,0>"..k..":	" temp_ort = " Ort("..v[para_id].."): " if type(v[para_id])=="number" and v[para_id]>0 then temp_ort = "<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..temp_ort end if #v[name_id]>max_len then max_len = #v[name_id] end table.insert(result, {temp_index, v[name_id], temp_ort, v[ort_id]}) end end for _,v in ipairs(result) do local len = #v[2] for i=1,max_len-len+1 do v[2] = v[2].." " end decho(v[1]) echo(v[2]) decho(v[3]) echo(v[4].."
") end echo("
 Es sind ") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>"..#result) echo(" fehlende EKs eingetragen.") end
function EK:find(attr, tofind, verbose) if not self:check_attr(attr) then return end local result= {} local ret = {} local max_len = 0 local count if type(tonumber(tofind))=="number" then count = tonumber(tofind) tofind = "" end local name_id = self:get_attr("name") local para_id = self:get_attr("para") local ort_id = self:get_attr("ort") local attr_id = self:get_attr(attr) local oid = #self.attr+self.own_id
tofind = string.lower(tofind) for k,v in ipairs(EK.npc) do if type(string.find(v[attr_id]:lower(), tofind))=="number" then temp_index = "" if #v[oid]>0 then temp_index = "<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..k..":	" else temp_index = "<255,255,0:0,0,0>"..k..":	" end temp_ort = " Ort("..v[para_id].."): " if type(v[para_id])=="number" and v[para_id]>0 then temp_ort = "<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..temp_ort end if #v[name_id]>max_len then max_len = #v[name_id] end table.insert(result, {temp_index, v[name_id], temp_ort, v[ort_id]}) table.insert(ret, k) end end if count then local v=#result-count-1 for i=1,v do result[i]=nil end end if verbose then for _,v in ipairs(result) do local len = #v[2] for i=1,max_len-len+1 do v[2] = v[2].." " end decho(v[1]) echo(v[2]) decho(v[3]) echo(v[4].."
") end echo("
 Es wurden ") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>"..#result) echo(" Treffer gefunden.

") end return ret end
function EK:check(id, date) if id>#self.npc then eprint("Es gibt nur "..#self.npc.." EKs in der Liste.", "EK-Tracker") return end date = date or os.date("%d.%m.%y") if #self.npc[id][6+self.own_id] >0 then echo("Der EK ") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>'"..self.npc[id][1].."'") echo(" wurde schon erworben!
") else self:load() self.npc[id][6+self.own_id] = date self:save() echo("Der EK ") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>'"..self.npc[id][1].."'") echo(" mit dem Datum ") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..date) echo(" versehen.
") self.saved = self.saved+1 if gmcp.MG.char.base.wizlevel == 1 then send("lies plakette") else self.current = self.current +1 GUI.ekanzahl:echo("EK-Anzahl: "..tostring(self.current), "black") end end end
function EK:uncheck(id) if id>#EK.npc then eprint("Es gibt nur "..#EK.npc.." EKs in der Liste.", "EK-Tracker") return end self.npc[id][6+self.own_id] = "" self.saved = self.saved-1 self:save() if gmcp.MG.char.base.wizlevel == 1 then send("lies plakette") else self.current = self.current -1 GUI.ekanzahl:echo("EK-Anzahl: "..tostring(self.current), "black") echo("Der EK ") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>'"..self.npc[id][1].."'") echo(" ist nicht mehr als erledigt markiert.") end end
function EK:describe(id) local name_id = self:get_attr("name") local ort_id = self:get_attr("ort") local region_id = self:get_attr("region") local magier_id = self:get_attr("magier") local hinweis_id = self:get_attr("hinweis") local para_id = self:get_attr("para") if id>len(EK.npc) then eprint("Es gibt nur "..len(EK.npc).." EKs in der Liste.", "EK-Tracker") return end ziel = EK.npc[id] local tab = {{}, {}} table.insert(tab[1], "<0,255,0:0,0,0>ID:") table.insert(tab[2], id) table.insert(tab[1], "<0,255,0:0,0,0>Name:") table.insert(tab[2], ziel[name_id]) local ort = "Ort" if type(ziel[para_id])=="number" then ort = ort .."("..ziel[para_id].."):" if ziel[para_id]>0 then ort = "<255,255,0:0,0,0>"..ort else ort = "<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..ort end else ort = "<255,255,0:0,0,0>"..ort.."(Spezial):" end table.insert(tab[1], ort) table.insert(tab[2], ziel[ort_id]) table.insert(tab[1], "<0,255,0:0,0,0>Region:") table.insert(tab[2], ziel[region_id]) table.insert(tab[1], "<0,255,0:0,0,0>Magier:") table.insert(tab[2], ziel[magier_id]) table.insert(tab[1], "<0,255,0:0,0,0>Hinweis:") local hinttext = break_lines(ziel[hinweis_id]) table.insert(tab[2], hinttext[1]) for i=2,len(hinttext) do table.insert(tab[1], "") table.insert(tab[2], hinttext[i]) end table.insert(tab[1], "<0,255,0:0,0,0>Geholt:") if #ziel[#self.attr+self.own_id]>0 then table.insert(tab[2], ziel[len(self.attr)+self.own_id]) else table.insert(tab[2], "<255,0,0:0,0,0>Nein") end table.insert(tab[1], "<0,255,0:0,0,0>Zweitis:") for i=1,len(self.players) do if len(self.npc[id]) < len(self.attr)+i then table.insert(self.npc[id], "") end if not(i==self.own_id) then if len(self.npc[id][len(self.attr)+i])>0 then table.insert(tab[2], self.players[i].." - geholt") else table.insert(tab[2], self.players[i].." - nicht geholt") end end end for i=3,len(self.players) do table.insert(tab[1], "") end print_table(norm_table(tab, -1, 1)) end
function EK:add(name, place, region, magician, description, para) ins = {name, place, region, magician, description, para} for _,_ in pairs(self.player) do table.insert(ins, "") end table.insert(self.npc, ins) self:save() decho("

<0,255,0:0,0,0>Neu eingetragener EK:
") self:describe(#self.npc) end
function EK:find_attr(attr, sub) local result={} sub = sub:lower() local attr_id = self:get_attr(attr) for _,v in pairs(self.npc) do if type(string.find(v[attr_id]:lower(), sub))=="number" then result[v[attr_id]] = 0 end end local keys = {} for k,_ in pairs(result) do if #k>0 then table.insert(keys, k) end end table.sort(keys) if #keys == 0 then iprint("Keine "..unlower(attr).." gefunden.", "EK-Tracker") else decho("
<0,255,0:0,0,0>Gefundene "..unlower(attr)..":

") for i,v in ipairs(keys) do echo(i..": "..v.."
") end end --self:save() end
function EK:unknown(x) if self.current == self.saved then echo("
Alle EKs sind verzeichnet oder zaehlen zu den ") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..self.player[ME.name]) echo(" Unbekannten.
") else echo("
Die Anzahl unbekannter EKs aendert sich von ") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..self.player[ME.name]) echo(" zu ") self.player[ME.name] = self.player[ME.name]+x decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..self.player[ME.name]) echo(".
") self.saved = self.saved+x self:save() send("lies plakette") end end
function EK:zwischen(von, datum, bis) -- Sonderregel if datum:lower()=="x" then if type(von)=="nil" then return true end return false end datum = tonumber(datum:sub(7,8)..datum:sub(4,5)..datum:sub(1,2)) if type(von)=="nil" then bis = tonumber(bis:sub(7,8)..bis:sub(4,5)..bis:sub(1,2)) return datum<= bis else if type(bis)=="nil" then von = tonumber(von:sub(7,8)..von:sub(4,5)..von:sub(1,2)) return von <= datum else bis = tonumber(bis:sub(7,8)..bis:sub(4,5)..bis:sub(1,2)) von = tonumber(von:sub(7,8)..von:sub(4,5)..von:sub(1,2)) return von <= datum and datum <= bis end end end
function EK:zeige(von, bis) local max_len = 0 local result = {} for k,v in ipairs(self.npc) do datum = v[6+self.own_id] if #datum>0 and self:zwischen(von, datum, bis) then temp_index = "<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..k..":	" temp_ort = " Ort("..v[6].."): " if type(v[6])=="number" and v[6]>0 then temp_ort = "<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..temp_ort end if #v[1]>max_len then max_len = #v[1] end table.insert(result, {temp_index, v[1], temp_ort, v[2]}) end end if #result==0 then decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>Keine Ergebnisse gefunden") end for _,v in ipairs(result) do local len = #v[2] for i=1,max_len-len+1 do v[2] = v[2].." " end decho(v[1]) echo(v[2]) decho(v[3]) echo(v[4].."
") end end
function EK:delete(id) if self.del_flag == id then if #self.npc[id][6+self.own_id]>0 then self.saved = self.saved-1 send("lies plakette") end for i=id,#self.npc-1 do self.npc[i]=self.npc[i+1] end self.npc[#self.npc]=nil self.del_flag = 0 self:save() decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>Der EK wurde geloescht.") else echo("
Moechtest du folgenden EK aus der Liste loeschen? Falls ja, wiederhole den Befehl!
") self:describe(id) self.del_flag = id end end
function EK:sort(old_id, new_id) temp = self.npc[old_id] if old_id < new_id then for i=old_id,new_id-1 do self.npc[i]=self.npc[i+1] end else for i=old_id,new_id+1,-1 do self.npc[i] = self.npc[i-1] end end EK.npc[new_id] = temp self:save() echo("
Der EK an der Stelle "..old_id.." wurde an die Stelle "..new_id.." gesetzt.
") end
function EK:check_attr(attr) if not(attr=="name" or attr=="ort" or attr=="region" or attr=="magier" or attr=="para" or attr=="hinweis") then eprint("Es kann nur eines der folgenden Attribute geaendert werden: Name, Ort, Region, Magier, Hinweis oder Para", "EK-Tracker") return false end return true end
function EK:change(id, attr, content) attr = string.lower(attr) if not self:check_attr(attr) then return end if self.change_flag == id then if attr == "para" then if not(tonumber(content)==nil) then content = tonumber(content) end end self.npc[id][self:get_attr(attr)] = content self.change_flag = 0 echo("
Das Attribut ") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..unlower(attr)) echo(" wurde zu 
") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..content) echo("
geaendert.

") self:describe(id) self:save() else echo("Willst du bei ...

") self:describe(id) echo("
... wirklich das Attribut ") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..unlower(attr)) echo(" zu 
") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..content) echo("
aendern? Falls ja, dann wiederhole den Befehl.

") self.change_flag = id end end
function EK:multichange(ids, attr, content) attr = string.lower(attr) if not EK:check_attr(attr) then return end local idn = {} if type(ids) == "string" then for zahl in ids:gmatch("%d+") do table.insert(idn, tonumber(zahl)) end elseif type(ids) == "table" then idn = ids end local id_check = false if type(ids) == "string" then id_check = self.mchange_flag == ids elseif type(ids) == "table" then if #self.mchange_flag == #ids then id_check = true for k,v in ipairs(self.mchange_flag) do if not (ids[k] == v) then id_check = false break end end end end if id_check then echo("
Das Attribut ") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..unlower(attr)) echo(" wurde zu 
") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..content) echo("
geaendert:

") if attr == "para" then if not(tonumber(content)==nil) then content = tonumber(content) end end local tab = {{}, {}, {}, {}} for i,id in ipairs(idn) do table.insert(tab[1], "<0,255,0:0,0,0>Name:") table.insert(tab[2], self.npc[id][1]) table.insert(tab[3], "<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..unlower(attr)..":") self.npc[id][self:get_attr(attr)] = content if self.npc[id][self:get_attr(attr)]=="" then table.insert(tab[4], "- kein Eintrag -") else table.insert(tab[4], self.npc[id][self:get_attr(attr)]) end end print_table(norm_table(tab, -1, 2)) else echo("Willst du bei ...

") local tab = {{}, {}, {}, {}} for i,id in ipairs(idn) do table.insert(tab[1], "<0,255,0:0,0,0>Name:") table.insert(tab[2], self.npc[id][1]) table.insert(tab[3], "<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..unlower(attr)..":") if self.npc[id][self:get_attr(attr)]=="" then table.insert(tab[4], "- kein Eintrag -") else table.insert(tab[4], self.npc[id][self:get_attr(attr)]) end end print_table(norm_table(tab, -1, 2)) echo("
... wirklich das Attribut ") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..unlower(attr)) echo(" zu 
") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..content) echo("
aendern? Falls ja, dann wiederhole den Befehl.

") self.mchange_flag = ids end end

Script.name: Plaketten handling
Script.script:
------------------------------------------------- -- Put your Lua functions here. -- -- -- -- Note that you can also use external scripts -- -------------------------------------------------
function EK:format_nums(a, b) local temp="" a = tostring(a) temp=temp..a if type(b) == "nil" then return temp.." " else b = tonumber(a)-tonumber(b) local vorz = "+" if b<0 then vorz ="" end b = tostring(b) for i=1,5-#b-#vorz do temp = temp.." " end if #vorz==1 then return temp.."<0,255,0:0,0,0>("..vorz..b..")" else return temp.."<255,255,0:0,0,0>("..vorz..b..")" end end end
function EK:save_plakettenabgleich(name) if self.plaketten_flag1 > -1 and self.plaketten_flag2 > -1 then name = name:lower() if not self.friends[name] then self.friends[name] = {{self.current, self.plaketten_flag1, self.plaketten_flag2, os.date("%d.%m.%y %H:%M")}} else table.insert(self.friends[name], {self.current, self.plaketten_flag1, self.plaketten_flag2, os.date("%d.%m.%y %H:%M")}) end self.plaketten_flag1 = -1 self.plaketten_flag2 = -1 self:show_friend(name) self:save_friends() end end
function EK:del_abgleich(name, id) if self.pdel_flag == id then for i=id,#self.friends[name]-1 do self.friends[name][i] = self.friends[name][i+1] end self.friends[name][#self.friends[name]] = nil self.pdel_flag = -1 self:show_friend(name,id) self:save_friends() else if type(self.friends[name])=="nil" then iprint("Mit diesem Freund hast du noch keine Plakette verglichen.") return end if id>#self.friends[name] then wprint("Es gibt nur "..#self.friends[name].." gespeicherte Plakettenvergleiche") return end echo("

Willst du wirklich den Eintrag mit der ID "..id.." loeschen?") self:show_friend(name,id) echo("Falls ja, dann wiederhole den Befehl.") self.pdel_flag = id end end
function EK:show_friend(name, id) name = name:lower() if type(self.friends[name])=="nil" then iprint("Mit "..name.." wurde noch keine Plakette abgeglichen.", "EK-Tracker") return end id = id or (#self.friends[name]-1) local start_id if id<2 then start_id = 1 else start_id = id-1 end local end_id if id+1>#self.friends[name] then end_id = #self.friends[name] else end_id = id+1 end local max_len = #name+9 echo("

") local tab = {} table.insert(tab, norm_length({"ID:", "", "", "", "Deine EKs:", "EKs von "..name..":", "Dir fehlen:", name.." fehlen:"}, 1)) fi = self.friends[name][start_id] table.insert(tab, norm_length({start_id.." ", fi[4]:sub(1,8).." ", fi[4]:sub(10,14).." ", "", self:format_nums(fi[1], nil), self:format_nums(fi[1]-fi[2]+fi[3], nil), self:format_nums(fi[3], nil), self:format_nums(fi[2], nil)}, 1, 2)) for i=start_id+1,end_id do fi = self.friends[name][i] fp = self.friends[name][i-1] table.insert(tab, norm_length({i.." ", fi[4]:sub(1,8).." ", fi[4]:sub(10,14).." ", "", self:format_nums(fi[1], fp[1]), self:format_nums(fi[1]-fi[2]+fi[3], fp[1]-fp[2]+fp[3]), self:format_nums(fi[3], fp[3]), self:format_nums(fi[2], fp[2])}, 1, 2)) end print_table(tab) end
function EK:diff(friend) friend = friend:lower() local oid = #self.attr+self.own_id local did = 0 for i,p in ipairs(self.players) do if p:lower()==friend then did = i break end end did = did + #self.attr local name_id = self:get_attr("name") local para_id = self:get_attr("para") local ort_id = self:get_attr("ort") local max_len = 0 local result = {} for i,npc in ipairs(self.npc) do if #npc[oid]==0 and (oid==did or #npc[did]>0) then temp_index = "" if #npc[oid]>0 then temp_index = "<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..i..":	" else temp_index = "<255,255,0:0,0,0>"..i..":	" end temp_ort = " Ort("..npc[para_id].."): " if type(npc[para_id])=="number" and npc[para_id]>0 then temp_ort = "<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..temp_ort end if #npc[name_id]>max_len then max_len = #npc[name_id] end table.insert(result, {temp_index, npc[name_id], temp_ort, npc[ort_id]}) end end if count then local v=#result-count-1 for i=1,v do result[i]=nil end end if #result==0 then decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>Keine Ergebnisse gefunden") end for _,v in ipairs(result) do local len = #v[2] for i=1,max_len-len+1 do v[2] = v[2].." " end decho(v[1]) echo(v[2]) decho(v[3]) echo(v[4].."
") end
if oid == did then echo("
Es wurden ") decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..#result) echo(" EKs gefunden, die noch fehlen.") else echo("
Es wurden ") friend_info = self.friends[friend] if friend_info then decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..#result.."/"..(friend_info[#self.friends[friend]][3])) else decho("<0,255,0:0,0,0>"..#result.."/XXX") end echo(" EKs gefunden, die noch fehlen.
") end end
